children.name: Pandion
children.description: One of the most cosmopolitan raptors, found on every continent except Antarctica. Adapted entirely for catching fish — reversible outer toe, spiny toe pads, closeable nostrils for diving. Sweden has one of Europe's largest osprey populations, over 4,000 pairs nesting on prominent dead snags above lakes and rivers.

children.name: Pandion haliaetus
children.description: A fish-eating raptor that hovers and then plunges feet-first to seize fish from lakes and coastal waters with reversible toes and spiny pads. Sweden holds one of Europe's largest populations, nesting on dead snags above water.
